repo_state.note: ~164 modified files from prior sessions preserved. ~10 files modified by this session's P0 repairs.

completed_fixes.summary: Delete crash lock in will-quit handler
completed_fixes.fix: Added try { unlinkSync(crashLock) } catch {} in will-quit handler (line 193)

completed_fixes.summary: Enable PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON in production SQLite
completed_fixes.fix: Added db.execute("PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON") after init (line 55). Drizzle ORM API used (db.execute not db.run) for PGlite compatibility. Postgres enforces FKs by default so this is a no-op on Pg; essential for SQLite backend.
Replaced module-level Map with Ref.makeUnsafe(Map). Uses two-tier: fast non-atomic get() read, then Ref.modify for atomic check-then-init.
Moved inflight entry cleanup from Effect.ensuring (before cache write) to after cache write. Outer Effect.ensuring handles interruption safety.

completed_fixes.summary: Wire invalidation bus to file edit events
completed_fixes.fix: Each file-writing tool now calls ContextInvalidationBus.notify('file.edited') after successful write
Added ToolTestCompleted/ToolValidateCompleted event names. test.ts, validate.ts, smart-bun.ts publish events to Bus after execution. Events flow: Tool → Bus.publish → EventBridge → EventStore.record

remaining_fixes.summary: Prevent plugin tools from colliding with built-in names
remaining_fixes.detail: Plugin tool registration should check built-in tool names and prefix or reject collisions
CoordinationClaimTable has no expiry column. Crashed agents leave zombie claims. Add expires_at column, auto-release on stale read, periodic sweep.

deferred_high_risk_patterns.risk: Plugin sandboxing — all 5 CRITICAL plugin findings (C07-C11) share root cause: plugins run in-process with full host access
deferred_high_risk_patterns.blocker: Requires process-level sandboxing, cannot fix with narrow patch

deferred_high_risk_patterns.risk: PTY env leaks (H22) — mapped as FIX-08 above, 1 line fix
Active tools not cancelled on shutdown — shell subprocess orphans (M21)
No uncaughtException/unhandledRejection handler in desktop main process (M17)
DuckDB context projection VIEW and TABLE share same name _ctx_file_relevance with different schemas (H12)
DuckDB query injection risk — manual SQL string escaping (H14)
smart-bash.ts uses spawnSync — blocks event loop for 60s (C03)

known_blockers: Cannot run tests from repo root — must cd packages/opencode
~164 pre-existing dirty files from prior sessions — session_diff includes these, cannot distinguish from session-owned changes
PGlite vs SQLite duality: PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON is SQLite-only syntax; Postgres enforces FKs by default. db.execute() silently accepts it on Pg, is essential on SQLite.
DuckDB context projection VIEW and TABLE share name _ctx_file_relevance — needs name split before ranking works
lessons_transferred: pragma-foreign-keys-sqlite-init: Production SQLite databases need PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON explicitly — Drizzle cascade deletes silently fail without it.
filelock-ref-modify-atomicity: FileLock's module-level Map requires Effect Ref.modify for atomic check-then-init.
cache-inflight-cleanup-order: Tool cache inflight entry must be cleaned AFTER cache write — Effect.ensuring guarantees cleanup even on interruption.
invalidation-bus-dead-code: ContextInvalidationBus.notify('file.edited') was never called from file-writing tools — 4 tools now fixed.
eventstore-test-events-pub: Test/validate tools must publish to Bus for EventStore persistence — no code was producing 'test_run' events.
crash-lock-cleanup-quit: Desktop crash lock must be unlinked in will-quit handler — lock was written but never deleted.
execution-agent-over-analysis: Execution subagents sometimes over-analyze and deviate from exact instructions in simple fixes.
what_to_do_next: Execute ALL remaining P1, P2, and P3 fixes. The bug hunt report at docs/json/opencode/bug-hunt-report.v1.json has full evidence for every remaining item.
